AAPL.summary: Apple’s grip on iPhone app distribution is loosening in another major market: Brazil.

AAPL.title: Tim Cook Says Apple Is About to Get Swamped By a “100-Year Flood”
AAPL.summary: The artificial intelligence boom is reshaping more than just software. It is rewriting the economics of the entire technology industry. The four largest hyperscalers — Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN), Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT), Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG), and Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) — are expected to spend roughly $750 billion on AI infrastructure in 2026. AAPL.title: Apple allows alternative app stores, payments in Brazil after deal with regulator
AAPL.summary: Apple said on Thursday it will allow developers in Brazil ‌to distribute iOS apps through alternative marketplaces ‌and process payments outside its system, following an agreement with ​the country's antitrust watchdog CADE.  • Apple agreed to make the changes to its services in December when it settled a dispute that had been opened ‌in 2022.  • For ⁠apps distributed via the App Store in Brazil, developers will be able to ⁠offer alternative payment methods within their apps and direct users to external websites to complete transactions, ​the company ​said.

AAPL.title: Intel jumps after Trump says Apple, Intel reached US chip deal
AAPL.summary: Intel (INTC) surged 9% in premarket trading after President Trump said in a Truth Social post that Intel and Apple (AAPL) have agreed on a deal to design and build semiconductors in the US.

AAPL.title: SanDisk and Micron surge as Apple confirms memory price pass-through
AAPL.summary: SanDisk is trading at $2,144.40, up +9.48% intraday and within reach of its 52-week high of $2,167.33, while Micron Technology is at $1,111.91, up +6.59% and just below its own 52-week peak of $1,116.25.
